args.notes: Parent asked a clinical question. Clinician should review and determine whether screening or evaluation is appropriate.
args.title: Review clinical question

args.body: Thank you for reaching out. We cannot assess clinical concerns over message, but our clinical team can review the concern and help determine whether a screening or evaluation is appropriate. A staff member will follow up with next steps.

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical team should review the question and determine whether a screening or evaluation is appropriate.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We cannot assess clinical concerns over message, but our clinical team can review the concern and help determine whether a screening or evaluation is appropriate. A staff member will follow up with next steps.
items.decision_rationale: Parent is asking for clinical guidance about typical development and whether intervention is warranted, rather than requesting a new referral or scheduling. This is a clinical question that should be directed to clinical staff for response. Urgency is P2 as this is a developmental question without acute concern. SLP discipline identified based on articulation concern.

args.title: Request missing referral information

args.body: Thank you for the referral. We need a few additional details before intake can proceed, such as the child’s DOB, guardian contact information, insurance details, and member ID if available. Our team will follow up to collect the missing information. No appointment has been scheduled yet.

items.recommended_next_action: Intake team should request missing required referral information before proceeding.

args.body: Thank you for letting us know. Our front desk team will review the schedule and follow up with available options. No appointment has been changed or confirmed yet.
